theme: invent the guild's shorthand for repeated rituals
title: The Guild Shorthand: Amortized Macro-Library Compression of Ritual Scripts
strategies: no compression, resubmit the ritual scripts verbatim (trivial)
mine exact byte-identical repeated instruction blocks, no operand canonicalization or parameterization (greedy)
canonicalize commutative operand order + abstract varying operands into formal macro parameters, mining recurring shapes by structural signature (strong)
true minimum-cost library (joint choice of which shapes to define, their arities, and non-overlapping placement) is NP-hard in general and stays open above strong
